en: Are you ready, Jerry? I'm ready.
I just want to make sure you're ready, brother.
Here it is.
Show me the money.
Oh!
Yo!
Hey!
Money! Oh, Jerry!
Does that make you feel good just to say that?
Say it with me one time, Jerry.
ko: 나와 함께 한 번 말해봐, 제리. 돈을 보여줘.

en: Show you the money. Oh, no, no.
You can do better than that, Jerry.
I want you to say it with me then, brother.
Hey, I got Bob Sugar on the other line.
ko: 이봐, 다른 전화에 밥 슈거가 있어. 네가 그걸 말하는 걸 들어야 해.

en: I better hear you say it. Yeah, yeah.
No, no, no. Show you the money. Not show you.
Show me the money. Show me the money.
Yeah! Louder! Show me the money.
That's it, brother, but you got to yell that shit.
ko: 그거야, 형, 하지만 그걸 소리쳐야 해.

en: Show me the money.
I need to feel you, Jerry.
ko: 네가 느껴져야 해, 제리. 돈을 보여줘!

en: Show me the money! Jerry, you better yell.
Show me the money!
Show me the money!
Do you love this black man?
I love the black man!
Show me the money!
I love black people!
